description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions CI workflow that runs on push to main, pull requests, and workflow dispatch. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to test across multiple operating systems (macOS, Ubuntu, Windows) and configurations (release, debug, ios, static, matlab, android). For each job, check out the repository, set up various languages (C++, PHP, Python, .NET, Java, Node, Ruby, MATLAB, Android), install dependencies, build, test, and upload artifacts.
